title: VCP Result + Attestation Envelope
description: Provider -> Gateway. Every result MUST carry a Provider-signed attestation. The Gateway MUST verify the signature and that capability_id and argument_hash match what it authorized before returning the (tainted) result to the Planner. See SPECIFICATION.md §9, §10.

result.description: The capability output. MUST validate against the capability's output_schema. MUST be size-bounded; oversized output MUST be paginated behind a state handle (§8).

effect_committed.description: false for a dry_run; true once the side effect is durably committed.

observed_external_refs.description: REQUIRED for external-read results (§10): the external state observed, e.g. calendar_event:evt_123.
